title: Extracting Customer Segments
scenario: Given a customer database with attributes 'age', 'loyalty_program', and 'purchase_history', extract customer segments based on the following rules: Segment 1 (young customers) - age < 25, Segment 2 (loyalty program members) - loyalty_program = 'gold', Segment 3 (high-value customers) - purchase_history > 500. The target output should be a JSON object with segment names as keys and lists of customer IDs as values. Constraints: Must handle multiple conditions, must use a conditional statement.

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the generated code adhere to the constraints?
Is the generated JSON syntax valid?
Does the generated code accurately implement the customer segmentation rules?
